name: Empire Equine
seoDescription: Empire Equine: mobile equine veterinary care in Sonoma County led by Dr. Michelle Beko (UC Davis '91)

sections.heading: Expert horse care from a Sonoma County vet who rides
sections.subheading: Dr. Michelle Beko, a UC Davis graduate and lifelong horsewoman, has cared for the area's horses through Empire Equine since 1992.
badges: Led by Dr. Michelle Beko, UC Davis DVM (1992)
Full-service equine care across Sonoma County

sections.heading: About Empire Equine
body: Empire Equine was founded decades ago by Dr. Jack Woolsey and Dr. Bob Norrie. Today it is owned by Dr. Michelle Beko, a UC Davis veterinary graduate, former Eventing competitor, and seasoned horse owner who joined the practice in 1992 and continues their legacy of excellence.

From our base at 2318 Olivet Ln in Santa Rosa, we provide up-to-date, high-quality, and compassionate care to all kinds of horses, donkeys, mules, ponies, and miniatures, ranging from high-performance athletes to pleasure, backyard, and elderly horses. We welcome novice owners with full support and education.
highlights: Led by Dr. Michelle Beko, UC Davis DVM (1992)
Full-service equine care across Sonoma County

items.title: Preventative & Wellness Care
items.description: Routine exams, vaccinations, and parasite control to keep your horse healthy year-round.

items.title: Annual Health Maintenance Program
items.description: Two yearly visits bundling physical exam, vaccinations, deworming, and teeth floating.

items.title: Dental Care
items.description: Teeth floating and dental treatments to support comfort and proper nutrition.

items.title: Lameness Evaluations
items.description: Diagnostic workups to find and address the source of lameness and performance issues.

items.title: Advanced Diagnostics
items.description: On-site diagnostic tools to investigate illness and injury accurately.

items.title: Reproductive Services
items.description: Breeding support including live cover and artificial insemination.

items.title: Led By Dr. Michelle Beko, UC Davis DVM (1992)
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: 24-Hour Emergency Service
items.body: When it matters, we move quickly — you won’t be left waiting.

items.title: Full-Service Equine Care Across Sonoma County
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Member, AAEP & AVMA
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: From Backyard Companions To Upper-Level Sport
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

sections.heading: Work with Empire Equine
sections.body: Find us at 2318 Olivet Ln. Call (707) 545-3909 — we’re glad to help.

items.a: You'll find us at 2318 Olivet Ln.
Mon, Tue, Thu, Fri: 9am–4:30pm; Wed: 11am–3pm; Sat–Sun: Closed (24hr emergency).
We proudly serve Santa Rosa, CA and the surrounding community.

items.a: Call us at (707) 545-3909 — we're glad to help.
